summary: The diff implements the four main requirements (REQ-9 through REQ-12) with good coverage. The backend CRUD API is present in backend/main.mo, the Catalogue page is built, the AddProduct form is implemented, and navigation links are added. However, there are some gaps: stable memory persistence is not explicitly implemented (no stable var or stable Map), and the required placeholder images are missing from the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Products are stored persistently in stable memory on the canister.
missing_requirements.reason: The backend uses 'var nextId = 0' and 'let products = Map.empty<Nat, Product>()' without the stable keyword or explicit stable memory mechanism, so data would not survive canister upgrades.

hallucinated_features.description: Additional backend query functions: getProductsByCategory, getProductsSortedByPrice, getProductsSortedByName
hallucinated_features.reason: These three extra query endpoints were not requested in the build spec. The spec only required addProduct, getProducts, getProductById, updateProduct, and deleteProduct.

hallucinated_features.description: Product category 'Accessories' added to both backend type and frontend UI
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies four categories: Men's Wear, Women's Wear, Kids' Wear, and Traditional/Ethnic Wear. An 'Accessories' category was added beyond the spec.

hallucinated_features.description: Search functionality with a text search box on the Catalogue page
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request for REQ-10 only requires filter/sort controls by category. A free-text search input was added which was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Image preview panel on the AddProduct form
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-11 only requires an Image URL input field. A live image preview feature was added beyond the specification.

hallucinated_features.description: Sort options beyond category filtering on the Catalogue page
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-10 specifies filter/sort controls by category only. Multiple sort options (price asc/desc, name A-Z) were added beyond the spec.
